name: =?utf-8?Q?Jodylynn=20Tedford?=
subject: Fwd: BRYANT UP BY 7 POINTS among voters who haven't returned their ballots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
|
---
| | Friend

I wanted to follow up and make sure you saw this poll that came out yesterday morning. As you know, the news we received just over a week ago showed us within just 4 points of Inslee with 12% of voters still undecided - an incredibly encouraging number for a challenger, because that's a large chunk of persuadable voters who aren't sold on another 4 years of Inslee.

Here's what we know:
* Recent polling from the University of Washington shows us within 4 points!
* 12% of voters are still undecided!
* Bryant leads Inslee among voters who haven't turned in their ballots by 7 points!

Here's what we're doing about it:
* Our phone banks are buzzing across the state, with daily updates on who has returned their ballot and who has yet to vote
* Our effective targeted ads are up on television and online through Election Day
* Our active supporter base is working closely with down ballot races statewide to make sure our collaborative GOTV programs leave no stone unturned

Here's what I'm asking of you - we need some last-minute resources to put everything we've got into GOTV. With momentum on our side and a lot of minds yet to be made up, the winner on the Election Day will be the campaign that turned out their supporters. With no time to waste, can you send us a quick contribution?
**[ *Send Bill $35* ](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=d86ffa5863&e=32f1a3df98)

[ *Send Bill $50* ](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=ec719979a4&e=32f1a3df98)

[ *Send Bill $100* ](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=1d48e0e12e&e=32f1a3df98)

[ *Send Bill $250* ](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=f6b9fc31da&e=32f1a3df98)** Let's win this!

**JodyLynn Tedford**
Finance Director
Bill Bryant for Governor
---
| |
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: Justin Matheson
Date: November 5, 2016 at 4:31 PM
To: Jodylynn Tedford
Subject: Fwd: BRYANT UP BY 7 POINTS among voters who haven't returned their ballots

Friend

We got some big news this morning - **of people who haven't returned their ballots yet, Bill is up by 7 points.** What we need to do now is double down on our Get Out The Vote efforts because it's going to be a photo finish.
We need to make sure these folks return their ballots. Can you help support our phone banks and canvassers with a quick contribution? ******[Chip in $15, $45, $75, or more right now so we can double our efforts!](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=37e7c57c91&e=32f1a3df98)**

Let's win this!

**Justin Matheson**
Campaign Manager
Bill Bryant for Governor
(253)220-5051

| | | | | | | [](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=1e152d0c61&e=32f1a3df98)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: last chance - will you give?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e0a/738133e4/33a8582e/7f85bae2/2082367673/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161106pm3?refcode=pme161106pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| I'm sorry to be emailing so late on a Sunday.

But this is important. We're still short of the $100,000 we need to fund our GOTV program and our last match program expires in hours.

So I'll make this quick -- [_**will you give $5 or more right now? Whatever amount you can give will be a huge help.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e0a/738133e4/33a8582e/7f85bae2/2082367673/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161106pm3?refcode=pme161106pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

We don't get another chance at this. If we miss this goal, we won't have time to make up for it.

The only surefire way to counteract the spending from Marco Rubio's special interest allies and win this race is with your help. Soon it'll be too late to make a difference.

**But not yet.** All contributions are still being doubled. [_**So get yours in right now.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e0a/738133e4/33a8582e/7f85bae2/2082367673/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161106pm3?refcode=pme161106pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thanks,

Patrick |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e0a/738133e4/33a8582e/7f85bae3/2082367673/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e0a/738133e4/33a8582e/7f85badc/2082367673/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: Martin Sheen
subject: I'm asking, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
President Bartlet and I agree on how to fight for democratic ideals when the stakes are high. That's why I'm asking you...
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161106-Sheen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend -- Josiah Bartlet and I were kindred spirits at times, especially when _West Wing_ hinted at the bleeding-heart liberal underneath.

It was a privilege to play him, but I'm prouder of a much more powerful calling: **being a dedicated Democrat who fights for the common good.**

[**That 's why I'm asking you to join me and help the DSCC today elect a Democratic Senate. We have a clear chance to continue our progress, but it will slip away unless grassroots Democrats take a stand now.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161106-Sheen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Don't misunderstand me on the appeal of political fantasy. I wish after a year like this -- with Trump leading Republicans no matter what vitriol he spews -- we could escape to rarified and dignified debates about democracy.

**But that dream scenario is nowhere close to the nightmare we 'll be stuck with if Republicans keep the Senate on Tuesday.**

So to borrow a line from Bartlet on the stakes of this election (with my own flair): **Our ideals cannot be met with merely our support -- the true measure of a people 's strength is how they rise to master moments that matter most.**

**Friend, time's running out to master THIS moment. Please stand with me and pitch in -- everything from Social Security to women's reproductive rights to the fight for equality is on the line:**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161106-Sheen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161106-Sheen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161106-Sheen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161106-Sheen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161106-Sheen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161106-Sheen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Remember that elections are not won by a simple majority - they are simply won by those who show up and vote. [**Let 's make sure Democrats are out in force on Tuesday >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161106-Sheen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you for stepping up,
Martin Sheen

Peter,

I know we're on the cusp of a historic victory and much better days ahead for our country. I'm running to serve you in the White House, and I'm ready to get to work.

**But I am afraid we will fall short tomorrow if I don't have every single supporter on board for the final day of the race.**

Your involvement is crucial - we must CLOSE STRONG TO WIN!

One of our top priorities is immediately investing additional dollars behind our TV, radio and digital ad campaigns in key battlegrounds, where we're seeing tremendous success.

[**JOIN Team Trump today with a $3, $5, $10, $20, $35, $50, $75 or $100 contribution to put us over the finish line to victory - every bit of support is a HUGE help!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38609703:sEl5khu4N:m:1:1155937413:D747E71353818CDC166C4BAEC9E7BEC9:r)

We're working 24/7 to overcome the Clinton campaign machine, the career politicians, the special interests and the lying liberal media.

_**They're panicked and DESPERATE to put Crooked Hillary in the White House!**_

[**JOIN NOW to help me defeat Crooked Hillary on Election Day, so I can get to work for you in the White House and get big things done for our country!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38609703:sEl5khu4N:m:1:1155937413:D747E71353818CDC166C4BAEC9E7BEC9:r)

Donald J. Trump

name: Greg Gianforte
subject: Cast your vote TOMORROW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican |
body:
If you haven't already voted, be sure to get to your polling place tomorrow! | | |
---|---|---
| [](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38478112:WyVvZhuNB:m:1:1369946915:6B9300883C36F9E3318EDCAF6D59C440:r) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| Friend,

With just hours until the polls open it's an incredibly busy day.

We're rallying supporters, making phone calls and talking to remaining undecided voters door-to-door... _and I wanted to make sure I didn 't forget to send you this note!_

I'm truly counting on your support to win - _**this race is a dead heat**_ , and now it's all about getting our supporters to the polls.

**If you did not cast an absentee ballot, please make sure to go to your polling location tomorrow and cast your vote for Gianforte/Robinson!**

If you need additional information on voting this year, including checking your registration or getting directions to your polling place, [**you can follow this link to the My Voter Page**](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38478113:WyVvZhuNB:m:1:1369946915:6B9300883C36F9E3318EDCAF6D59C440:r) on the Montana Secretary of State's website.

With your help we can prevail tomorrow over the special interests pouring massive amounts of dark money into our state - _no matter the outcome, we know it 's going to be close! _

My opponent is unencumbered by the truth and he's hurled a lot of lies at me. I am happy to address any questions you have about these false attacks. Please email [**info@gregformontana.com**](mailto:info@gregformontana.com) and my team and I will set the record straight.

I'm ready to get to work on an agenda that creates jobs and opportunity for ALL Montanans, while protecting our traditions and unique way of life.

**But first we need to win**. And that's why your support is so important!

[**Please tap or click here if you need information on where to vote tomorrow**](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38478113:WyVvZhuNB:m:1:1369946915:6B9300883C36F9E3318EDCAF6D59C440:r).

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Greg Gianforte |

subject: All comes down to tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Tomorrow we can make history – JOIN Team Trump with an emergency donation RIGHT NOW to Make America Great Again! |

Friend, Here we are – less than 36 hours away from the close of this incredible 2016 presidential election. We are on the doorstep of a HUGE victory and new direction for our country... but we must close strong, and I need EVERY supporter on board. >>> CONTRIBUTE NOW TO ENSURE TRUMP VICTORY TOMORROW <<< We’ve achieved amazing things in this race, from winning the nomination in a crowded field to building the most successful grassroots fundraising operation in Republican Party history. And now it’s all coming down to tomorrow when you, the voter, decides if we’re going to change America forever. I need your help more than ever before so we can WIN tomorrow and get to work. name: Ben Carson
subject: A Million Reasons Why
body:
Tomorrow is Election Day! | [View this email in your browser.
](http://email.bencarson.com/p/vsMBh_huNB)
---|---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38624578:sMBh_huNB:m:1:876315805:84F52491410C202A22151EE88648F97E:r)
---
* * *

Dear Peter,
* **19 Trillion dollars** in United State debt ([Nation Debt Clock](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38624579:sMBh_huNB:m:1:876315805:84F52491410C202A22151EE88648F97E:r))
* **927,520+ abortions** in the United States so far this year, **59.5 Million+** since Roe vs. Wade ([Number of Abortions](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38624580:sMBh_huNB:m:1:876315805:84F52491410C202A22151EE88648F97E:r))
* United States has only 5 percent of the world's population, it has nearly **25 percent of its prisoners -- about 2.2 Million people** ([Incarceration Nation](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38624581:sMBh_huNB:m:1:876315805:84F52491410C202A22151EE88648F97E:r))

**An estimated 25 million evangelical Christians didn 't vote in 2012!** We, the people, have a million reasons why our vote matters. Yet, what will tomorrow's future look like if the faithful refuse to invest in it? I am asking everyone reading this message to: **Pray** - Revival begins with prayer and confession, both personally and as a nation. Join us tonight, November 7th, at 9PM (ET), as we pray for the nation. Text **PRAY **to 67076 on your mobile phone to be a part of the movement. **Think** - As one of millions who will cast their vote at the polls tomorrow, first get informed by taking advantage of these [voting tools](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38624582:sMBh_huNB:m:1:876315805:84F52491410C202A22151EE88648F97E:r):
* [Party Platform Comparisons](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38624583:sMBh_huNB:m:1:876315805:84F52491410C202A22151EE88648F97E:r)
* [Finding Your Polling Location](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38624584:sMBh_huNB:m:1:876315805:84F52491410C202A22151EE88648F97E:r)
* [Voting Made Easy Interactive Tools](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38624585:sMBh_huNB:m:1:876315805:84F52491410C202A22151EE88648F97E:r)
* [Inspirational Quotes & Scriptures](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38624586:sMBh_huNB:m:1:876315805:84F52491410C202A22151EE88648F97E:r)

**Vote** - It's up to every one of us. No more pledges. No more indecision. It's time to cast your ballot. And don't stop there. Connect with your friends and family, and make sure they are casting their vote. If someone you know needs assistance getting to their polling location, help them out. Together, we are 90 million strong. God bless the United States of America! In Christ,
Ben Carson My Faith Votes
---

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38624587:sMBh_huNB:m:1:876315805:84F52491410C202A22151EE88648F97E:r)
---

You were added to the system April 11, 2015.

My whole life, whenever my father has set out to do something, he gets the job done.

**And if you put him in the White House, he will get the job done for you, securing the border, attacking crime, destroying ISIS, creating jobs, and cleaning up the cesspool of corruption in DC.**

name: Bill Cole
subject: 24 Hours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| | Friend -- In 24 hours polls across West Virginia will open and Election Day will be upon us. I want to be the first to remind you that it is crucial you exercise your constitutional right to vote tomorrow. The outcome of this race will be determined by the team who can get more of their supporters to the polls. So today, please take few minutes to remind your friends and family how important it is that they make their voices heard. The polls open at 6:30am tomorrow morning and close at 7:30pm tomorrow night. If you don’t know where to cast your ballot you can find your polling location by **[clicking here.](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fservices.sos.wv.gov%2FElections%2FVoter%2FFindMyPollingPlace&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_7&n=1 "Find your polling location")** [](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fservices.sos.wv.gov%2FElections%2FVoter%2FFindMyPollingPlace&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_7&n=2 "Find your polling
location") Thanks, Bill

---

name: Cerron Cade, Carney Campaign Manager
subject: Will you help out?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1003817681951916032/5803758933076082688?recipientId=58ALV4wVN5uKbcFGD7pzR2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1003817681951916032/5803758933076082688?recipientId=58ALV4wVN5uKbcFGD7pzR2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) Friend, In less than 24 hours, Delawareans will begin heading to the polls. Let's make sure they're voting for John and the rest of the Democratic ticket. There are several competitive local races right now, and we need to make sure that we get out the vote to elect hardworking Democrats. We're almost there, but we need you now more than ever to help us get to the finish line. Here are 5 ways _**YOU**_ can help our team win on Tuesday: 1\. MAKE A PLAN Where are you voting? When are you voting? Are you going with anyone? [Make a plan to vote on Tuesday.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1003817681951916032/5947874121151938560?midqs=6771724989704962048) **2\. VOLUNTEER** We need volunteers to knock on doors and make phone calls to ensure that folks get out and vote. We have offices throughout the state: Wilmington, Brandywine, Newark, New Castle, Middletown, Dover, Georgetown, and Lewes. **Sign up to volunteer here: [www.johncarney.org/GOTV](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1003817681951916032/6019931715189866496?midqs=6771724989704962048)** ****3\. ATTEND OUR GOTV RALLY**** Join us Monday night in Wilmington for our Get Out the Vote Rally! The GOTV rally starts at 5:30pm at our Wilmington Riverfront HQ (960 Justison Street, Wilmington, DE 19801). We'll have refreshments, and music will be provided by DJ Mega Skills. RSVP by calling 302-803-1921. 4\. SHOW YOUR SUPPORT Show your friends on Facebook and Twitter that you're supporting John. Update your profile picture with the **" I'm voting for John Carney" **sticker by clicking this link: **[www.johncarney.org/social](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1003817681951916032/6091989309227794432?midqs=6771724989704962048)** 5\. CHIP IN TODAY Contribute what you can to help cover meals for our volunteers and to carry our message to the end. We're almost there. Let's keep the momentum going to elect John and strong leaders across our state! Cerron **Cerron Cade** **Campaign Manager**

name: Trey Gowdy
subject: Telling it as it is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|

Peter,

As a former prosecutor, I tell it as it is.

That's why when I tell you that this is serious -- I mean it.

Election Day is tomorrow -- **and we are falling behind in television ad spending by $25 million.**

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: Only 24 hrs left: final phone bank TONIGHT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | At 7 a.m. tomorrow morning, the polls open and Election Day 2016 begins.
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5714145422130083072/6894960445225110272) Dear Peter, At 7 a.m. tomorrow morning, the polls open and Election Day 2016 begins. There are thousands of Utah voters who feel the same as you and I--who want clean air, better schools, medical cannabis, and accountability from our Utah elected officials. But many of them don't vote. In fact, nearly half a million Utahns aren't even registered to vote. This year, we need to turn out more Utah voters than ever before. And we can -- with your help! Join us TONIGHT from 6 - 8 p.m. for a FINAL phone bank, and make phone calls to let those voters know that we need them more than ever! **[Sign up now to make calls tonight and help'Get Out The Vote' in Utah!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5714145422130083072/6894960445225110272)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5714145422130083072/6894960445225110272) Did you know that almost 1 MILLION eligible Utahns choose not to vote? (Check out our [newest video](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5714145422130083072/6967018039263038208) to learn more!) We've been working hard all year to change that, but we need your help. Come give just 120 minutes and help bring balance back to Utah politics! **[Click here to volunteer TONIGHT and help get other Utah voters to the polls!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5714145422130083072/6894960445225110272)** Together with you,
Mike P.S. **[If you can't make it tonight to help out, then please consider pitching in $5 to our Get Out the Vote fund.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5714145422130083072/7039075633300966144?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor

body:
Tomorrow is Election Day. This is your final chance to have an impact on this race. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46bd/1c469400/1459937/3545e54/584850641/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-07_tom_nd&refcode=ema_2016-11-07_tom_nd&utm_campaign=tom&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- here are the numbers you need to know:
* 45-44: The slim margin that separates Russ from Senator Johnson in the latest -- and FINAL -- Marquette poll of this race
* $20,000,000 (TWENTY MILLION DOLLARS): The amount of right-wing money that has poured into Wisconsin over the course of this campaign to make sure we don't win
* $30,937: what we still need to raise to reach our goal that will ensure our get-out-the-vote program is fully funded

Tomorrow is Election Day. This is your final chance -- and I mean _final_ \-- to have an impact on this race and help send Russ Feingold to the Senate. We're close to making sure our get-out-the-vote program is fully funded -- but we're not quite there yet. I need you to help make up the difference. **[It all comes down to you. subject: Now or Never
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We need your help to make sure we don’t miss turning out a single one of these voters. |

It's now or never, Friend Tomorrow, this election will be over and we need to make sure that we elect my father, who has a vision for a greater nation, as our next President. name: Matt Rosendale
subject: big day tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt for Montana, PO Box 1538, Helena, MT 59624, Republican, Lorna Kuney, Treasurer |
body:
I will keep this brief because we still have a lot of work to do before the big day tomorrow.
| |
---|---|---
|
[](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38628832:W0GpLDuhN:m:1:1443712213:F6D8761D41A185ED72AE2898A552B73D:r) Fellow Montanan, I will keep this brief because we still have a lot of work to do before the big day tomorrow.

I just wanted to remind you that tomorrow is Election Day. Please make sure you get out and vote. _There are many close races across Montana; they are all _very_ important_.

The truth is, ours could be one of those races. My opponent and the Democrat machine have been spending hundreds of thousands of dollars trying to buy this election. _And don 't forget the insurance special interests have given $40,000+ to my opponent to protect their huge executive bonuses and fancy new buildings--all while health insurance premiums are skyrocketing_. Don't let them get away with it! **We can win this race and send a message**.

__**If you received an absentee ballot and have not yet turned it in, it 's too late.**__ Don't mail it; it won't arrive in time! _**Hand deliver it to your county elections office**_ to ensure your vote is counted. [If you are unsure where your county elections office is, you can click here to look it up](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38628833:W0GpLDuhN:m:1:1443712213:F6D8761D41A185ED72AE2898A552B73D:r).

_Lastly, thank you for all of your support over the last year_. When I announced back in February, I promised to do everything I could to run a good, issues based race. We have campaigned hard, now it's your turn. It's up to you.

Polls open tomorrow at 7:00am--take your family, take your friends. If we show up, we win.

Warm Regards,
[](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38628832:W0GpLDuhN:m:1:1443712213:F6D8761D41A185ED72AE2898A552B73D:r)
Matt Rosendale |
| | [](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38628834:W0GpLDuhN:m:1:1443712213:F6D8761D41A185ED72AE2898A552B73D:r)
---|---|---
|

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Sharon=20Day=2C=20RNC?=
subject: What is your Election Day plan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Make a plan. |

Friend, What is your plan for voting on Tuesday, November 8th? Don’t wait another day before making your plans: · Find out your polling location and other voting information by visiting Vote.gop · Pick out a time in the day that is convenient to you · Invite a neighbor to go with you Your vote on Tuesday isn’t just about this election. Your vote is for the next generation. Your vote will determine the shape of the Supreme Court for years to come. Your vote is an opportunity to affirm your beliefs. Use your vote to get this country back on the right track. On Tuesday, a new chapter in our nation’s history will open. Make sure that you are a part of the choice for the direction our country will take. If you still need to find out where your polling location is, you can visit Vote.GOP right now. It’s up to you now. Help us take back our nation and our future! Thanks, Sharon Day Co-Chairman, RNC
Find My Polling Location

name: Jeff Harris, GreggForGovernor.com
subject: Peter, here's your assignment for today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
This'll be fun -- I swear. I'm sharing these six big reasons why I'm voting for John Gregg with my friends, and I wanted to share them with you too.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4431783252494776320/-1382744123198011392?utm_campaign=engg_6reasn_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161107_engg_gq_6reasn_ful__jh)
---
Peter, This'll be fun -- I swear. I'm sharing these six big reasons why I'm voting for John Gregg with my friends, and I wanted to share them with you too. **_Take a look, then ask a friend to vote for John this Tuesday when you share this list:[Forward To A Friend](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4431783252494776320/-1526859311273867264)._**
1. **John 's the quintessential Hoosier. He grew up in Sanborn, worked his way through college and law school, was elected speaker of the Indiana House, and became president of Vincennes University.**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4431783252494776320/-1382744123198011392?utm_campaign=engg_6reasn_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161107_engg_gq_6reasn_ful__jh)
[Post to Facebook ►](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4431783252494776320/-1310686529160083456) [Share on Twitter ►](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4431783252494776320/-1238628935122155520)

2. **John 's vision and experience have won him strong endorsements from the _Indianapolis Star, Terre Haute Tribune Star, Fort Wayne Journal Gazette, Evansville Courier & Press, and the South Bend Tribune._**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4431783252494776320/-1382744123198011392?utm_campaign=engg_6reasn_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161107_engg_gq_6reasn_ful__jh)
[Post to Facebook ►](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4431783252494776320/-1310686529160083456) [Share on Twitter ►](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4431783252494776320/-1238628935122155520)

3. **John 's been endorsed by the political action committees of both the Indiana Fraternal Order of Police and Indiana State Police Alliance for his commitment to keeping Indiana safe.**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4431783252494776320/-1382744123198011392?utm_campaign=engg_6reasn_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161107_engg_gq_6reasn_ful__jh)

4. **As speaker of the Indiana House, John won national recognition for working with Republicans and Democrats to balance the budget and fund education.**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4431783252494776320/-1382744123198011392?utm_campaign=engg_6reasn_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161107_engg_gq_6reasn_ful__jh)

5. **As the former president of Vincennes University, John has the experience -- and a comprehensive plan -- needed to fix the testing mess, fully fund pre-Kindergarten, and make college affordable.**

| Hey - We've been telling you it's crunch time, and we meant it. That's why you've been hearing from us so much this week. We're not in the final days of this campaign anymore. We're in the final hours. **We really need to find the resources to push past the finish line, and we really need your help to do that.[Our match program is still in effect -- can you chip in and have double the impact?](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e09/738133e4/33a721aa/7f85bbbb/3307294910/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm?refcode=pme161107pm_m&recurring=true&amount=10")**

Tomorrow is election day. That means that after tomorrow, this will all stop. The GOTV effort, the fundraising, the campaigning. But first, we have to make it through the next day, and we need you to do that. [**Please, can you give a few more dollars to this critically important race?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e09/738133e4/33a721aa/7f85bbb4/3307294910/VEsF/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm?refcode=pme161107pm_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

Your support could decide this race. And it's an incredibly important one: not only do we have a chance to turn Florida and the Senate blue, we have a chance to end Missing Marco's political career forever. We need you -- quick, can you give a few dollars? **All gifts will be MATCHED until Midnight >>** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in $3 now>>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e09/738133e4/33a721aa/7f85bbb5/3307294910/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=pme161107pm_m")** **[Chip in $25 now>>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e09/738133e4/33a721aa/7f85bbb6/3307294910/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=pme161107pm_m")** **[Chip in $50 now>>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e09/738133e4/33a721aa/7f85bbb7/3307294910/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=pme161107pm_m")** **[Or, donate another amount>>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e09/738133e4/33a721aa/7f85bbb0/3307294910/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm?refcode=pme161107pm_m")** Thank you,
Patrick |

name: Al Franken
subject: about Wednesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
"These three things that will definitely happen this Wednesday..." [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161107-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend -- Here are three things that will definitely happen this Wednesday.

1. My favorite NBA team, the Minnesota Timberwolves, will play the Orlando Magic.

2. Actor Lou Ferrigno, who played the Incredible Hulk, will celebrate his 65th birthday.

3. You will either feel wonderful because we **[did our part to make sure that Hillary Clinton wins and Democrats take back the Senate...](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161107-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5") or miserable because we didn't.**

If we win, this will be one of the best Wednesdays of your life. Your alarm clock will sound like your favorite band playing your favorite song. You'll jump out of bed like an Olympic gymnast. Your toast will be perfect -- crispy from edge to edge, and no matter how much jelly you put on it, it'll never get soggy. Never.

But if we don't? If we let Donald Trump win the presidency, or if we let his enablers in the Senate keep the majority? Then it won't matter how beautiful a day it turns out to be -- you'll be as upset as the Incredible Hulk himself.

[**You can act right now to make Wednesday a great day -- by making a triple-matched gift to help Democrats turn out every vote and win back the Senate!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161107-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Republicans just dropped $25 million into Senate races across the country. They think this late infusion of cash will let them wake up to a majority ready to pass President Trump's agenda... or obstruct everything President Clinton wants to do.

But after every ugly thing they've said and stood by in this campaign, I think they deserve some soggy toast on Wednesday morning.

**But only you can make sure it happens, Friend. Please make a triple-matched gift right away to help the DSCC run the table on Election Day!**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161107-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161107-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161107-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161107-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161107-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161107-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

What we do in these final days -- heck, these final _hours_ \-- will decide whether it ends with the big win we've been working towards for so long. And whether we meet this challenge will decide not just how we feel on Wednesday morning, but what happens in our country for years to come.

[**So click here and give a few bucks right now, okay?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161107-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks,
Al

P.S.: The Timberwolves and Magic play Wednesday night, and by then, I'll either be exhausted from celebrating or too despondent to watch. [**Let 's make it the "exhausted from celebrating" one -- click here to help Democrats win big!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20161107-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efce/2b07114c/4dffe73b/735d3e28/4286410288/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efce/2b07114c/4dffe73b/735d3e2b/4286410288/VEsHDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efce/2b07114c/4dffe73b/735d3e2a/4286410288/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Team Bayh
subject: Less than 24 hours to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50600/7be36b49/1e2f2b91/78f99f66/2418553945/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
**LESS THAN 24 HOURS UNTIL ELECTION DAY!
[Give us one last boost to Get Out the Vote for Evan. Pitch in $5 now >>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50600/7be36b49/1e2f2b91/78f99f65/2418553945/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161107.1nd&amount=10")** Friend -- If you think we're taking it easy today, you couldn't be more wrong. Our team spent the weekend contacting _one million Hoosiers_ to urge them to vote for Evan -- and **we 're going to keep fighting for every vote until the polls close at 6 p.m. tomorrow.**

But we need your help to do that. See, **we went all-out this weekend, and now funds are running low.** If we want to keep fighting as hard as we need to elect Evan and defeat Koch puppet Congressman Todd Young, we need your support one more time.

**[Will you chip in $5 to help us reach _every single Hoosier voter_ before the polls close?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50600/7be36b49/1e2f2b91/78f99f65/2418553945/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161107.1nd&amount=10")** [](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50600/7be36b49/1e2f2b91/78f99f65/2418553945/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161107.1nd&amount=10") _\-- Wall Street Journal_ No one knows how this race will turn out. It's been a toss-up for weeks, if not months. That means _**every vote will matter**_.

It's not too late to make a difference. Your generous gift will be rushed right out to our field team and fuel their frenzied effort to knock on _more_ doors and make _more_ reminder calls before the deadline.

If you've helped us out before, we really appreciate it. But this is crunch time, so we have to ask again:

**[Will you dig deep and pitch in $5 to elect Evan Bayh, the clear choice for Indiana?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50600/7be36b49/1e2f2b91/78f99f65/2418553945/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161107.1nd&amount=10")**

Thank you,

Team Bayh ** **** ** ************[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50600/7be36b49/1e2f2b91/78f99f64/2418553945/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161107.1nd&amount=25")************
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50600/7be36b49/1e2f2b91/78f99f6b/2418553945/VEsB/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Team Maggie
subject: Your voting plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdded/2a380d31/1472308b/ff2a10/2851404592/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdded/2a380d31/1472308b/ff2a10/2851404592/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Alright, New Hampshire --
If we're going to elect Governor Hassan to be our next U.S. Senator, it's time to get out there and VOTE. We know that Maggie has the strongest grassroots support in the Granite State, but if _any one of you doesn't turn out to vote tomorrow, we could hand this seat back to Kelly Ayotte._ Here's what you need to do to make sure we win this thing:
1\. Go to **[iwillvote.com](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdded/2a380d31/1472308b/ff2a11/2851404592/VEsF/ "http://iwillvote.com")** right now to make sure you know where you're going to vote tomorrow.
2\. Talk to ALL your friends and neighbors and tell them to do the same -- go to **[iwillvote.com](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdded/2a380d31/1472308b/ff2a11/2851404592/VEsC/ "http://iwillvote.com")** -- to make sure they're all set for tomorrow as well. Don't forget to remind everyone that **they can register to vote in-person tomorrow right at their polling place.**
3\. **Get out and vote tomorrow.**
We can win this for Maggie and for our families, but only if we all do our part to turn out the vote. We're counting on you, team.
-- Team Maggie

name: Al Franken
subject: Russ needs us
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
We need people like Russ in Washington. And he won't get there without your help. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46bf/1c469400/141f35d/3545ff3/701672365/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-07_AF_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-07_AF_ND&utm_campaign=AF&utm_medium=ema") "Koch brothers inject fresh cash into Wisconsin Senate race" -Real Clear Politics, 11/1/16 "Koch brothers target Feingold in big ad buy in Wisconsin" -Roll Call, 11/2/16 Friend, Back in 2010, my good friend Russ Feingold lost his Senate seat thanks to the Tea Party and a wave of outside money. This year, Russ's opponent is going back to the same playbook -- duck the tough questions and attack Russ with some help from his billionaire friends. **[We won't know if these attacks were effective until after the election. What we do know is that Wisconsin is vital for Democratic efforts to retake the Senate -- and the polls are within the margin of error. Russ needs and deserves our help. Make a contribution right now.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46bf/1c469400/141f35d/3545ff3/701672365/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-07_AF_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-07_AF_ND&utm_campaign=AF&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46bf/1c469400/141f35d/3545ff0/701672365/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-07_AF_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-07_AF_ND&utm_campaign=AF&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46bf/1c469400/141f35d/3545fee/701672365/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-07_AF_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-07_AF_ND&utm_campaign=AF&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46bf/1c469400/141f35d/3545fef/701672365/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-07_AF_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-07_AF_ND&utm_campaign=AF&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
Russ Feingold built a rock-solid reputation as one of the most progressive members of the Senate. He is the "Feingold" in "McCain-Feingold," the landmark campaign finance reform bill that was partially struck down by _Citizens United_. He was the only member of the Senate to vote against the Patriot Act in 2001, and he continues to fight tirelessly for civil liberties.
Russ understands the power of unchecked and unaccountable money in politics -- he's seen how it can sway elections in Wisconsin and across the country. Like me, Russ understands the power and importance of grassroots organizing. But he also knows that without grassroots fundraising, the big-money donors will always win.
**[Nine right-wing groups are combining to spend $10 million against Russ in the final days of this election. We need to help Russ's team get out the vote -- make a contribution right now, and let's go win this thing.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46bf/1c469400/141f35d/3545ff3/701672365/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-07_AF_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-07_AF_ND&utm_campaign=AF&utm_medium=ema")**
We need people like Russ in Washington. And he won't get there without your help.
Thanks,
Al

| Election Day is 24 hours away, and we are busier than ever at our campaign headquarters.

We're working hard to make sure we have the resources to fund the biggest Get Out the Vote effort we can.

**The polls have been back and forth. It 's still too close to call, so we have to pour every dollar into our field operation.**

Every dollar that comes in the door will go right to paying for campaign material, vehicles, and volunteer coordination. We have to call voters, knock on their doors, and pass out flyers.

[_**This grassroots team has stood by Deborah since the beginning. You helped make this one of the tightest contests in the country. Don 't give up now. Rush in $5.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f4205a/2cc31c44/40ea434/19f9d981/2354264182/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161107pm?refcode=dre161107pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Team Ross |

_(The Hill, 11/06/16)_

Friend, if we maintain our leads in other swing states, Michigan could be the one state that WINS us the White House. _But we have to take action IMMEDIATELY._

While Hillary and Obama frantically tour Michigan today and Washington Democrats spend millions to try to stop us, _I 'm calling on you to help launch a 24-HOUR grassroots fundraising blitz to make Michigan Republican for the first time in 28 YEARS._

[**> >MICHIGAN EMERGENCY FUND<<**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjba00jBAEGE6CDhWgaEAF7DRMN6aaaaEAF7BMCCDKla?l=~@sAs~x-&V=mg5ZucrjDy_pdjZu.Txd&u=c&6=&i=-s9y-xHdrTqZpRw1ndnip1olwUHZwYHaoTHkHkHYo1n1-&kHk)

The talking heads in the media are shocked that the race in Michigan is SO CLOSE. But you and I both know why we're standing strong in a state that hasn't voted Republican since 1988.

Hillary has supported liberal, elitist policies that have wiped out Michigan's manufacturing, destroyed the auto industry, shipped its jobs overseas, and crushed working families.

My father is ready to renegotiate our disastrous trade deals, bring back our jobs, and revive our fallen cities with school-choice policies, support for our local police officers, and fewer regulations for small businesses.

The media doesn't want you to believe that this movement is happening. But our strength in Michigan is all the proof you need that America is waking up. The American people have had enough of politics-as-usual and are ready to take our country back.

Your contribution will help us provide immediate, last-minute resources to TRIPLE our Get-Out-The-Vote effort and run more positive, America-First ads across Michigan.

But we need to secure the resources right now.

[**Please make an immediate contribution to the Michigan Emergency Fund.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjba00jBAEGE6CDhWgaEAF7DRMN6aaaaEAF7BMCCDKla?l=~@sAs~x-&V=mg5ZucrjDy_pdjZu.Txd&u=e&6=&i=-s9y-xHdrTqZpRw1ndnip1olwUHZwYHaoTHkHkHYo1n1-&kHk)

Eric Trump

name: John Gregg
subject: Two things, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
It's the night before Election Day, and things are frantic -- so I'll make this quick. I need you to do two things tonight.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-924595147075352576/5103846715099056128?utm_campaign=gotv_2thing_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161107_gotv_gq_2thing_ful__jg)
---
Peter, It's the night before Election Day, and things are frantic -- so I'll make this quick. **I need you to do two things tonight:**
1. **[Confirm where you vote.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-924595147075352576/5103846715099056128?utm_campaign=gotv_2thing_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161107_gotv_gq_2thing_ful__jg)**
2. **[Sign up for a volunteer shift.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-924595147075352576/5175904309136984064?utm_campaign=gotv_2thing_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161107_gotv_gq_2thing_ful__jg)**

If you wake up on November 9 and wonder why you didn't do these two simple things, you're going to be kicking yourself for a long time. So now's the time to start thinking about where you vote, when you'll vote, and how you're going to get there -- then find a time you can stop by a local office to help other voters do the same. And while your neighbors won't know who you vote for, a quick search will let them all know if you vote or if you stay home. **Do your part. Do these two simple things right now:**
1. **[Confirm where you vote.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-924595147075352576/5103846715099056128?utm_campaign=gotv_2thing_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161107_gotv_gq_2thing_ful__jg)**
2. **[Sign up for a volunteer shift.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-924595147075352576/5175904309136984064?utm_campaign=gotv_2thing_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161107_gotv_gq_2thing_ful__jg)**

I'm counting on you, Peter -- and so is Indiana. See you at the polls, John
| | [**Find my polling place ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-924595147075352576/5103846715099056128?utm_campaign=gotv_2thing_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161107_gotv_gq_2thing_ful__jg)

| **" Two of the nation's most important swing states once again come down to the wire"**
_\-- YouGov/CBS News 2016 Battleground Tracker_ Florida is a pivotal state in the battle for control of the Senate. Races here are decided by razor thin margins, and ours is no exception. We're one of the "nation's most important swing states" \-- and the day before Election Day, we're up by just **one point **in the latest poll! We can win -- but it's going to take one last big push for our GOTV effort. So many of you have helped us out and gotten us this far, but we need you one more time. [**Can you give now to help win tomorrow?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e04/738133e4/335fabbe/7f85bc66/533470697/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm3?refcode=pme161107pm3_m&recurring=true&amount=10") In a race this close, every single vote counts. name: Katie McGinty
subject: Team, a last note before tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friends, it all comes down to tomorrow.

They called us “underdogs” when we first started this campaign, but I always had faith in this team. I knew that together — fighting for the principles we believe in and the people we love — we could do anything together.

Now, thanks to your grassroots grit and steely determination, we’ve turned this race into a dead heat. So I’ll say it again: It all comes down to tomorrow.

It’s hard to understate the significance of this election, Look — everything we believe in is on the ballot: Fairness, equality, progress, the very character of our nation. If we want the America we deserve, then we have to vote for it tomorrow.

If you don’t know your voting place, you can find it here: https://katiemcginty.com/find-polling-place/. Polls are open from 7:00am to 8:00pm, and if you need help voting, you can call 1-878-777-3861. Please, call your friends, family, and neighbors to make sure they’re voting too.

I am so proud of this team, and everything we’ve done together. Now let’s go win tomorrow.

For Pennsylvania —

Katie

------
Katie McGinty
Candidate for U.S. Senate

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-3589709601295040512/-8894301400800952320.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
This race is coming down to the wire – we need you on board to WIN! Join our efforts tonight. |

Friend, We’re wrapping up a busy weekend, working around the clock to rally Trump supporters across the country and get out the vote tomorrow. In less than 36 hours the polls will close on this historic election. We can’t let up for a moment – there is far too much on the line for our country. The fact is we need EVERYONE who cares about a more secure and prosperous future for our country to join Team Trump tonight. We truly need your help more than ever. JOIN NOW to help us rush resources to key battlegrounds, to make more phone calls, knock on more doors and get more voters to the polls on Election Day. CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT My father is running for our nation’s highest office because he is sick and tired of seeing the American people get ripped off. He’s sick of the corruption, the incompetence and the lies out of Washington. He’s running to drain the swamp once and for all, and you know he has the vision and determination to get big things done and Make America Great Again! I can assure you that my father will fight for you every day in the White House. But first we need to defeat Crooked Hillary on Tuesday. We’re counting on you to JOIN TODAY so we can close strong and WIN. The last thing we want is to wake up on Wednesday morning knowing that we could have done more in this election. The stakes are far too high. With less than 36 hours to go, it’s all hands on deck. Please join Team Trump with an emergency contribution of $3, $5, $10, $20, $35, $50 or $100 tonight. EVERY bit of support will help get out the vote for my father. Thank you. Let’s win this on Tuesday, Eric Trump P.S. Don’t wait – JOIN our efforts tonight. We have less than 48 hours until the polls close, and we need to rush resources into key battlegrounds to get out the vote for my father. Thank you so much for ANY help you’re able to provide. CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Rob Portman
subject: Less than 24 hours
body:
| Peter \--

Jane, Jed, Will, Sally and I are just leaving our Columbus office after thanking our volunteers as we approach Election Day. Today, we've thanked volunteers in Mayfield Heights, met with friends at FOP Lodge #9 in Columbus, thanked our team at Headquarters, and now we're headed to Dayton. By tomorrow, our Countdown to Victory RV tour will have made 80 stops over 4,000 miles across 35 counties!

We're taking nothing for granted with less than 24 hours until Election Day! Tomorrow, voters across Ohio will have a clear choice between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

Since we launched our campaign in January of last year, we've worked extremely hard, opening 12 field offices, contacting 5.8 million targeted Ohio voters, and building an unrivaled grassroots organization.

Now that this campaign is coming to an end, I'd appreciate your vote so I can continue to fight for Ohio workers and families. [Click here](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.MYOHIOVOTE.COM&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update4&n=1) to find your polling location! All best,
Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update4&n=2)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update4&n=3)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update4&n=4)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update4&n=5). -=-=-

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: So proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello there,
This is the last time I'll be emailing you before Election Day.
In New Hampshire, we've worked together to make college more affordable, expand health care, and foster our small businesses -- and we're seeing results all across the state. Now, we need Washington to take our bipartisan, common sense approach. For over a year this campaign has been working to get the message out there -- you can have a Senator who is part of the status quo or a new Senator who will put families first.
I want to say that I am incredibly proud of this grassroots team -- we've done just about everything we can to reach voters, but there are still a few things left to do before tomorrow.
First, we still need your help fundraising. We're still seeing last-minute, desperate attacks from Washington Republicans and corporate special interests -- we're doing everything we can to push back, but we need your help. ****[Please, give $3 or more now to help push back on outside spending so that corporate special interests can't decide this election.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdde4/2a380d31/1474a8a2/ff288d/3659951942/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA3cG0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161107pm-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")****
Most importantly, Election Day is tomorrow, and I want every single person reading this to commit to vote, it's the cornerstone of our democracy! [**Please, go to iwillvote.com to confirm your polling place, and make sure you're all set for tomorrow.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdde4/2a380d31/1474a8a2/ff288e/3659951942/VEsE/ "https://www.iwillvote.com/home/") Also, talk to your friends and make sure they're ready too!
Tomorrow is the big day, and I respectfully ask for your vote so that we can take our priorities to the Senate and make change for Granite State families.
I'm so thankful for this incredible team.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdde4/2a380d31/1474a8a2/ff288d/3659951942/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA3cG0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161107pm-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdde4/2a380d31/1474a8a2/ff288f/3659951942/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Justin=20Matheson?=
subject: FINAL HOURS and polls are tight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
|
---
| | Friend

In just under 36 hours, polls in Washington will close. With how much the polls have tightened in such a short amount of time, we might not know who the next governor is at that point.

What we __will__ know is that we did everything we possibly could to put a leader behind the governor’s desk in Olympia. We’ll know we stretched every dollar you contributed to this campaign, while Governor Inslee spent millions more without increasing his support.

With a recent poll having us within 4 points, and a subsequent poll having us **_AHEAD_** by 7 points among those who haven’t turned their ballots in, don’t let anyone tell you we can’t pull this off.

We know it’s a horse race and every ballot will count.

Right now, every dollar that comes in is immediately put into online advertising, phone banking, and volunteer support. We adjust our budgets in real time so the effect of your contribution can be immediately realized.

I promise, this will be one of the last times I ask you for a contribution. You have done so much, and it has brought us so close. We need to get every ballot in and every vote counted.

This is only possible with your help, and we’re so grateful to have it.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: on the brink of history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Many thanks for all your support for our grassroots campaign across this beautiful state. |
Friend, tomorrow this long election will finally be decided by the voters. For over a year I have criss-crossed this state and talked to Marylanders about their hopes and concerns. Regardless of gender, age, race, or creed, people are eager to elect public servants who are focused on getting results and addressing the challenges facing individuals, families and communities in our state and country.

From the beginning of this campaign we set out to build a positive, statewide grassroots movement that engaged Marylanders in a discussion about how to move our state and country forward - and I'm proud to say that, with your help, that's what we've done.

Tomorrow is Election Day and we have done our best to make sure that voters are informed about the stakes and choices as they head to the polls to select their Senator, Members of Congress, and the next President of the United States.

Friend, this has been one of the most divisive and unpredictable presidential elections in our lifetime, but today we are on the brink of history. If people get out and vote we will be successful in electing Hillary Clinton as our next president. But the work won't end there. If all goes well, the day after the election we'll need to get up and come together to work to advance the common good.

My final request to you before voting begins tomorrow morning at 7 a.m. is that you send a personal email to your family, friends and colleagues who did not vote early to urge them to go vote tomorrow,

Thank you for everything,

Chris
[DONATE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b7c/70cdc2ba/473f70cd/397843d/2380113249/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em110716_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em110716&source=em110716")
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Vermont's Small, Independent Businesses Endorse Phil Scott
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:**
November 7, 2016

**Media Contact:** Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**NFIB/VT Small Business Members Endorse Phil Scott for Governor**

_Nation’s largest small business association says, on the issues important to Vermont’s small businesses, Phil Scott is the clear choice in this election_
Montpelier, Vt. – The National Federation of Independent Business/Vermont (NFIB/VT), the largest small business association in the country, endorsed Phil Scott for Governor.

"Lt. Governor Scott has repeatedly voiced the importance of addressing Vermont's crisis of affordability and ensuring that our state retains and empowers small business owners as well as attracts new ones. His determination to put Vermont on a more fiscally solvent path makes Mr. Scott the obvious choice for the NFIB endorsement in this year's gubernatorial race," according to Shawn Shouldice who serves as NFIB Vermont’s state director. "The small business sector has been crushed by the Shumlin Administration's failed policies including Vermont Health Connect as well as hundreds of millions of dollars in higher taxes, fees, and surcharges. A tenacious and determined leader is certainly needed to eradicate these harmful policies and initiatives."

More than 95 percent of businesses in Vermont are small businesses and together they employ about 60 percent of the workforce[1].

“I am honored to have the support of NFIB/VT,” said Scott. “I have owned a small business for 30 years and it was my experience in business that led me into politics sixteen years ago. I understand the challenges small business face, and I respect the critical role they play in our economy. As Governor, I will bring that knowledge and understanding to my decision making so that we can build a strong economy that supports all Vermonters,” Scott said.

“For the last several years, as Lt. Governor, I have travelled across the state and put myself in the shoes of many small-business owners through my ‘Everyday Jobs Tour.’ Between the tour and this campaign, I have met countless entrepreneurs and business owners with good ideas and ambitions to grow in Vermont. All they need now is the right economic climate,” Scott said. “That is why I have made the economy and affordability the centerpieces of my campaign. I look forward to partnering with NFIB and other Vermonters who share our vision to fight for a pro-growth initiatives and a vibrant economy,” Scott said.

###
* * *
[1] https://www.sba.gov/sites/default/files/vt12.pdf
---

subject: Donald Trump Endorses Eric Greitens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Austin Chambers (mailto:austin@ericgreitens.com) , 314-914-5454
November 7, 2016

ICYMI: Donald Trump Urges Vote for Eric Greitens and Against Chris Koster

After Barack Obama endorsed Chris Koster in Koster’s final ad, Donald Trump endorsed Eric Greitens and encouraged Missourians to vote for Greitens.

See the tweet here: (https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/795753162623815680?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=7cab2c17af-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-7cab2c17af-99411629)

https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/795753162623815680?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=7cab2c17af-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-7cab2c17af-99411629

Barack Obama (http://fox2now.com/2016/11/07/obama-backs-chris-koster-for-missouri-governor-in-new-ad/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=7cab2c17af-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-7cab2c17af-99411629) endorsed Chris Koster in Koster’s final ad and said that Koster would implement the Obama agenda in Missouri. Obama’s endorsement followed Hillary Clinton giving $500,000 to the Koster effort.

“This election could not be more clear,” said Greitens campaign manager Austin Chamber. “Chris Koster is a crooked, career politician just like Hillary Clinton. Eric Greitens is a conservative outsider ready to lead our state.”

###

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Make sure you vote. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTgzMzE2MAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDU5NTg3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, With one day left, we're ending this race like we started it: strong, progressive, and united. **I 'm proud of the campaign we've run. We activated thousands of volunteers to persuade millions of Washingtonians to vote with our message of continuing to build a Washington that works for everyone.** Whether it was highlighting the 250,000 new jobs that have been created, the lowest unemployment since 2008, building a sustainable economy, protecting Washington's environment, or widening educational opportunities -- our campaign stayed positive and focused on the issues that really matter to Washingtonians. **Tomorrow, we will start getting results and know if Washingtonians want to continue the progress we have already made. I believe they do.** But over 2,373,509 voters have yet to return their ballots and I know we can't leave anything to chance. Voters are still making their choice. [**That 's why I'm making a final ask before Election Day. Can you contribute $5 to help us reach these last-minute voters?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTgzMzE2MAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDU5NTg3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) I want to make sure we close out this campaign having done everything possible to get Democrats out to vote for me, and for critical races up and down the ballot. The direction of our state and its progressive future depend on it. Complacency by Democrats in these final hours cannot be an option. Let's bring it home tomorrow by continuing to work hard today. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=OTgzMzE2MAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDU5NTg3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7517/24c69fd9/555c279/18ec98e7/1840565497/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEW20N_digital_email_20161107_AlwaysRemember_n-all&source=WPEFEW20N_digital_email_20161107_AlwaysRemember_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

You'll always remember what you did during the 2016 election.

It's such a historic time for this community. We finally, FINALLY have a pro-choice Democratic woman who is so close to becoming our next president. She's smart, passionate about helping women and families, and gets things done -- she's everything I'd want in a candidate. And we have six women running to flip Republican-held Senate seats and take back the Senate for Democrats. It can't happen without EMILY's List candidates.

I'm proud to be part of a community that's invested so much in electing Hillary, flipping the Senate, and sending more Democratic women to the House.

But it all comes down to tomorrow. And right now, our candidates need us to keep helping them until the very end.

**[Donate $3 to help our candidates push through the last 24 hours of their campaigns-- and win.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7517/24c69fd9/555c279/18ec98e0/1840565497/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161107_email_AlwaysRemember?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+our+candidates+push+thr&utm_campaign=WPEFEW20N_digital_email_20161107_AlwaysRemember_n-all&source=WPEFEW20N_digital_email_20161107_AlwaysRemember_n-all")**

Between Hillary Clinton's historic candidacy and Donald Trump's horrifying run, people will be talking about this election for years to come. And frankly, we'll be glad to tell people that yes, we _did_ fight hard to stop Trump and elect our first woman president. And yes, we _did_ work to make sure we had a Democratic-controlled Senate to back her up.

But even today, one day before Election Day, the presidential polls are tight and four of our Senate races are still listed as toss-ups. We still need to help our candidates come out on top -- and when they do, we can scream and shout from the rooftops that we helped make it happen.

We've been working hard for almost two years. We've been raising money, talking to friends and neighbors, making calls, and knocking on doors. However you've pitched in -- any victories tomorrow are yours.

**Be a part of history. Donate $3 now to help Hillary and other pro-choice Democratic women win:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Be-Part-of-This](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7517/24c69fd9/555c279/18ec98e1/1840565497/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161107_email_AlwaysRemember?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgBePartofThis&utm_campaign=WPEFEW20N_digital_email_20161107_AlwaysRemember_n-all&source=WPEFEW20N_digital_email_20161107_AlwaysRemember_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7517/24c69fd9/555c279/18ec98e2/1840565497/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161107_email_AlwaysRemember?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEW20N_digital_email_20161107_AlwaysRemember_n-all&source=WPEFEW20N_digital_email_20161107_AlwaysRemember_n-all")

|
---|---|---
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Calling for Our Revolution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
It's crunch time. Between now and the time that polls close tomorrow night, we are going to contact as many voters as possible to make sure they turn out to vote.
Our Revolution has endorsed more than 100 candidates and ballot initiatives in nearly every state. And right now our number one priority is to have one-on-one conversations with voters about the candidates who will help carry out the goals of our political revolution.
**Will you make some calls to turn out the vote for Our Revolution's candidates?**
****[YES, I'LL MAKE CALLS»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/phonebank/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/phonebank/")****
**[NO, BUT I'LL DONATE $3»](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotv-for-our-revolution?refcode=em161107 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotv-for-our-revolution?refcode=em161107")**
During the primary, our candidates won by margins as little as 17 votes, and making calls is a very effective way for you to help out and make sure they come out on top on Election Day.
We hope you'll hop on the phone to get out the vote for the candidates who are committed to our effort to transform American politics and reclaim our democracy from the billionaire class. Your calls could mean the difference between victory and defeat.
Thank you for everything you do for our political revolution.
In solidarity,
Kyle Machado
Director of Organizing
Our Revolution
** **

clean_body: It's crunch time. Between now and the time that polls close tomorrow night, we are going to contact as many voters as possible to make sure they turn out to vote. Our Revolution has endorsed more than 100 candidates and ballot initiatives in nearly every state. And right now our number one priority is to have one-on-one conversations with voters about the candidates who will help carry out the goals of our political revolution. Will you make some calls to turn out the vote for Our Revolution's candidates? ** "" "" During the primary, our candidates won by margins as little as 17 votes, and making calls is a very effective way for you to help out and make sure they come out on top on Election Day. We hope you'll hop on the phone to get out the vote for the candidates who are committed to our effort to transform American politics and reclaim our democracy from the billionaire class. Your calls could mean the difference between victory and defeat. Thank you for everything you do for our political revolution. In solidarity, Kyle Machado Director of Organizing Our Revolution ** PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION 603 2ND ST, NE WASHINGTON, DC, 20002 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Friends, After three debates, thousands of TV and radio ads, and countless stops all across North Carolina, it is finally here. When we wake up tomorrow morning, it'll be Election Day. This has been a marathon for many of us. Now we have to finish this final sprint and run through the tape at the finish line. Slowing down now is not an option. **Now let's dig deep and give it everything we've got for the next 24 hours and make sure Roy comes out on top. North Carolinians deserve better than what we've been getting with Governor McCrory over the last four years.
We deserve an economy that works for everyone -- not just those at the top. We deserve a leader who makes public education a priority.
Most of all, we deserve a governor who doesn't put political ideology ahead of our needs as citizens.
Let's go out and elect Roy Cooper tomorrow.
**[Every single dollar helps at this point. Chip in if you're with me.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a92/2fde7c66/435acbfb/15693f35/3745978501/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-edaytomorrow?utm_campaign=fnd_1dayfr_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161107_fnd_gq_1dayfr_ful__fp&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Sincerely,
Ford Porter
